# Hierarchical (Multilevel) Designs and their implementation in R 

June 17th, 2026 

## Review 

Below is a general description of the mindmap for this course. 

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Mind map", out.width = '100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("../figures/mindmap2.jpg")
```



## Split-plot designs 


## General advice to model data with some type of structure

- 1. Draw a picture of the data generating process, focusing on the structure (blueprint) of the data 
- 2. Define the groups of similar observations (in terms of structure) 
- 3. Write out a statistical model 
- 4.
